title: Request to Update Email Address / Login Username
description: Steps for customers to reset their password and update email address or login username through the rainGO app.

content.overview: Customer Request: Customer is requesting to update registered email address or change login username
content.complianceNotice: Security & Compliance Notice (POPIA): Due to POPIA (Protection of Personal Information Act) compliance, we are not allowed to directly update or change email addresses or login usernames on behalf of the customer. Instead, we must verify ownership and guide the customer through a secure self-service process.
agentActionSteps: Send reset username link to customer

title: Order Management
description: This article covers order-related enquiries for new service orders, including order statuses, delivery updates, order cancellations, returns, and RICA-related delivery issues.

title: Promise to Pay
description: Procedure for handling billing and payment options concerns.

title: Migration Order
description: Migration orders are created when an existing customer upgrades or downgrades their current service or subscription. Orders processed for service changes will appear on the Order dashboard.

title: Simple Troubleshooting Steps
description: This guide provides agents with a step-by-step process to troubleshoot customer reports of slow speeds, unstable connection, or no connectivity on the 5G service.

sections.description: Check if the customer is normal or in arrears
Check if the customers device is online or offline
Check if the customer is still on their regular site, and its status
Check if the device is getting the speeds it should
Check which wifi network the client device is connected to

title: Troubleshooting Guide - Validate Account & Service
description: Step-by-step troubleshooting guide for agents to identify and resolve customer connectivity issues on 5G service.

details: Confirm the customer address of use is correct and updated on the system
Verify the service policy is active (must be on High Speed)
Blank Policy or policy: -- follow no connection troubleshooting
Check for any active alarms/outages on nearby 5G sites
